column1: Table S6. Non-redundant HSF-compatible locations in the native and in-silico-designed HSE-disrupted 49-bp sequences and Col-0 ONSEN terminal candidate windows.

column2: Total number of HSF-family PWM matches passing the relative score threshold. Similar HSF PWMs can match overlapping sequence intervals and are counted separately in this metric.
Number of distinct sequence intervals remaining after merging genuinely overlapping HSF-family motif hits across PWM models and strands.

column1: Raw HSF hit density per kb
column2: HSF PWM model-position hits divided by sequence length and multiplied by 1000.
Non-redundant HSF-compatible locations divided by sequence length and multiplied by 1000.
Ratio of raw HSF PWM model-position hits to non-redundant HSF-compatible locations.
Percentage of raw HSF PWM model-position hits collapsed by overlap-based merging.
Coordinates after placing all hits onto the forward sequence. For copy-wide scans, reverse-strand matches were converted to forward coordinates before merging.
Relative PWM score scaled between the theoretical minimum and maximum possible scores for the corresponding PWM.
